result.stdout:
Extra parameters specified: --help

'devto' - publish artile to dev.to

Expected usage: MarkdownToGist devto <options> 
<options> available:
  -f, --file=VALUE           markdown file path
  -k, --apiKey=VALUE         dev.to api key
  -s, --status=VALUE         publish status public/draft
